case_title: KAVANAGH, DENNIS vs. PIMENTELLI, MICHAEL DBA PIMENTELLI MECHANICAL SVCS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT PIMENTELLI, MICHAEL DBA PIMENTELLI MECHANICAL SVCS
